prompt: Generate an ELN entry for a flow cytometry experiment to characterize T-cell activation markers. We stimulated PBMCs from Donor A (passage 0) with 5 µg/mL anti-CD3 (BioLegend 317302, lot B12345) and 2 µg/mL anti-CD28 (BioLegend 302902, lot C67890) for 48 hours at 37°C/5% CO2 in RPMI + 10% FBS. We used 1×10^6 cells/mL density on BD FACSCanto II. Antibody panel: CD69-PE (BioLegend 310906, lot D11111) and CD25-APC (BioLegend 302610, lot E22222). Hypothesis: >70% CD4+ T cells will upregulate CD69 and CD25. Note: anti-CD28 lot was substituted (E22223 → C67890) due to stock depletion — same vendor/clone, validated lot, low impact.
